description: The Ledge Shirt in Heather Granite Plaid from Taylor Stitch 8-oz. 100% organic cotton twill. Washed for a soft, lived-in feel. Our signature California collar. Two U-shaped chest pockets with button-through flaps. Lock stitched buttons and buttonholes. Double-needle felled construction. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Good Acre Forge Overshirt in Black Canvas
description: The Good Acre Forge Overshirt in Black Canvas from Taylor Stitch 12-oz. 100% cotton Mt. Vernon duck canvas. Dual oversized flap chest pockets with button closure. Single button shirt cuff. Two-piece sleeve construction. Double-needle felled construction throughout. Matching buttons. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in California.

name: The Apres Short in Rinsed Indigo Pincord
description: The Apres Short in Rinsed Indigo Pincord from Taylor Stitch 5.5-oz. 100% organic cotton corduroy. 6-oz. 100% organic cotton SF map pocketing. Washed for a soft, lived-in feel. Indigo yarns will wash and fade beautifully over time. Elastic waistband with drawcord. Button fly. Two front slash pockets. Two back patch button-through pockets. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Heavy Bag Waffle Short Sleeve in Faded Black
description: The Heavy Bag Waffle Short Sleeve in Faded Black from Taylor Stitch 14-oz. 52% upcycled cotton, 48% recycled polyester. Custom-developed material based off our favorite vintage seed stitch thermals. Ribbed neckline and cuffs. Tailored fit. Please size up for a looser fit. Pre-shrunk. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 6'1", wearing a Medium.

name: The Long Haul Jacket in Rinsed Indigo Waffle
description: The Long Haul Jacket in Rinsed Indigo Waffle from Taylor Stitch 8.5-oz. 100% organic cotton waffle. Indigo waffle is washed to bring out the beautiful texture of the fabric. Two rounded patch chest pockets. Left pocket features a pen sleeve. Front welt hand-warmer pockets. Two interior pockets at waist level. Adjustable back tabs. Zig-zag reinforcement stitching on under collar and front placket. Custom antique copper tack buttons and rivets. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in Vietnam.

name: The Long Haul Jacket in Coal Waxed Canvas
description: The Long Haul Jacket in Coal Waxed Canvas from Taylor Stitch 9-oz. 100% organic cotton waxed canvas. Custom developed by Halley Stevensons, the leading expert in waxed/weatherproofed fabrics since 1864. 6-oz. 100% organic cotton chambray body lining with durable water repellent finish. 1.5-oz. 100% recycled nylon sleeve lining. 7-oz. 100% organic cotton corduroy collar and interior sleeve cuff. 7-oz. 100% organic cotton brushed pocketing. Two rounded patch chest pockets. Left pocket features a pen sleeve. Front welt hand-warmer pockets. One interior welt chest pocket with snap closure. Zig-zag reinforcement stitching on under collar and front placket. Tack button closure and rivets to reinforce stress points. Spot clean only. Made in China.

name: The Taylor Stitch x Hypeadelic Cap v2.21
description: The Taylor Stitch x Hypeadelic Cap v2.21 from Taylor Stitch Each handmade by Dave Latina of Hypeadelic, using upcycled materials from archival Taylor Stitch garments. Each cap in this collection is a one-of-a-kind design and is individually numbered. Leather slide adjustment on back. Spot clean only. Made in the USA.

name: The Short Sleeve Jack in Dried Cherry Seersucker
description: The Short Sleeve Jack in Dried Cherry Seersucker from Taylor Stitch 3.5-oz. 100% organic cotton. Tailored fit with higher armholes to prevent bunching and increase range of motion. Shorter length to be worn untucked. Sleeve length measures 9" from the shoulder. Garment dyed and washed for a soft, lived-in feel. No pleats for easy ironing and clean lines. Features our signature Jack button-down collar. Single rounded chest pocket. Double-needle felled construction. Lock stitched buttons and buttonholes. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 6'2", wearing a Medium.

name: The Jack in Rinsed Indigo Stripe Chambray
description: The Jack in Rinsed Indigo Stripe Chambray from Taylor Stitch 4.5-oz. 100% organic cotton chambray. Indigo yarns will wash and fade beautifully over time. No pleats for easy ironing and clean lines. Our signature Jack button down collar. Single rounded chest pocket. Double-needle felled construction. Lock-stitched buttons and buttonholes. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

name: The Candle in Haven
description: The Candle in Haven from Taylor Stitch Top Notes: mandarin and cypress. Heart: Gurjun balsam and elemi. Drydown: Virginia cedarwood, oakmoss and olibanum. Vegan soy wax blend. 100% cotton wick. Comes in a reusable glass vessel. Made in Brooklyn, NY by Joya Studio. Approximate Burn Time: 50-60 hours.

name: The Foundation Belt in Whiskey
description: The Foundation Belt in Whiskey from Taylor Stitch True to pant size, size up if between sizes. 100% cowhide. Leather is 3.4mm thick. 1 1/4" wide. Rounded antique brass buckle. Turn back construction with waxed cord detail. Made in Turkey.

name: The Taylor Stitch x Hypeadelic Cap v2.25
description: The Taylor Stitch x Hypeadelic Cap v2.25 from Taylor Stitch Each handmade by Dave Latina of Hypeadelic, using upcycled materials from archival Taylor Stitch garments. Each cap in this collection is a one-of-a-kind design and is individually numbered. Leather slide adjustment on back. Spot clean only. Made in the USA.

name: The Bomber Jacket in Army Suede
description: The Bomber Jacket in Army Suede from Taylor Stitch Goat suede. 6-oz. 100% cotton body lining. Acetate twill sleeve lining. 1x1 rib at cuff, neck, and bottom opening. Two lower single welt hand warmer pockets. Interior welt pocket at chest height. Corozo buttons. Dry clean only by leather professionals. Made in Turkey.

name: The Fremont Jacket in Aged Penny Chipped Canvas
description: The Fremont Jacket in Aged Penny Chipped Canvas from Taylor Stitch 12.5-oz. 100% organic cotton. Stone washed for a worn-in look and feel. Unlined. Single chest pocket with button-through flap. Two lower top and side entry pockets. EDC / Phone pocket on the inside of the wearer's lower right pocket. Single interior pocket at chest height. Engineer style button cuffs. Bar tacked at stress points. YKK donut hole buttons. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China. Model is 6'2", wearing a Medium.

name: The Eddy Cardigan in Heather Marine Herringbone
description: The Eddy Cardigan in Heather Marine Herringbone from Taylor Stitch 100% merino wool. 7 gauge yarns. V-neck. 5 button front. Black horn-colored buttons. Lower welt pockets. Single layer rib at cuffs and bottom opening. Double layer rib at welts and CF opening. Hand wash cold and lay flat to dry or dry clean. Made in China.

name: The Valencia Sweater Polo in Heather Cilantro Rib
description: The Valencia Sweater Polo in Heather Cilantro Rib from Taylor Stitch 85% BCI cotton, 15% linen. 12 gauge. Drop stitch stripe construction in the body and sleeves. Full milano rib knit placket and collar. 1x1 rib on sleeve and bottom opening. Flat hem. Hand wash cold and lay flat to dry. Made in Vietnam.

name: The Cinder Jacket in Coal Dry Wax
description: The Cinder Jacket in Coal Dry Wax from Taylor Stitch 11.5-oz. 100% organic cotton dry waxed canvas. 8.5-oz. 100% organic cotton corduroy top collar. 6-oz. 100% organic cotton chambray body lining and viscose sleeve lining. YKK two way zipper closure with storm flap and fireman's clasp. Two lower patch pockets with reinforced bottom, snap flap closure and metal eyelets for drainage. Side entry hand pockets with brushed organic cotton lining. Interior pocket at hem with snap closure for added storage. Sleeve tab with buttons for adjustability. Rivets and interior fabric mounts for pocket reinforcement. Zig-zag reinforcement stitching on under collar. Double-needle felled construction. Wash cold and hang to dry. Made in China.

name: The Cutter Overshirt in Timber Plaid
description: The Cutter Overshirt in Timber Plaid from Taylor Stitch 12.5-oz. 100% organic cotton oversized twill. 6-oz. 100% organic cotton chambray on interior cuff, collar and front placket. Washed for a soft, lived in feel. Two rounded button-through chest pockets. Adjustable button cuff. Double-needle felled construction throughout. Wash cold and tumble dry low. Made in China.

Its calm, quiet typing experience lets you stay in your zone anywhere. Its also features 4-in-1 multi-device connectivity (3x Bluetooth + 2.4GHz dongle), instant OS key remapping, and a long-lasting rechargeable battery providing up to five weeks of power on a single charge. Sustainably designed with a removable battery that meets EU 2027 replaceability standard, the Slim EX1 Wireless Keyboard combines performance with responsibility.

If you are looking for a high-performing, multi-display workstation, then this dock is just what you need.

Designed with MagSafe-compatible technology, this sleek vegan-leather wallet effortlessly and securely attaches to your iPhone in a snap connection so you can conveniently carry your cards, ID, or even cash wherever you go. The versatile magnetic wallet holds up to four cards and is also designed to double as a durable and sturdy stand for your iPhone, giving you a hands-free option to browse the web, stream videos, or hop on a FaceTime call in both portrait and landscape mode.

It boasts interchangeable storage and tool-free installation , giving users the flexibility to effortlessly switch between multiple SSDs depending on their needs . It also enables Apple ProRes Log on iPhone 15/16 Pro, a high-quality video format that enhances shooting and post-editing capabilities. Small and compact, the Enclosure includes a lanyard cable that is perfect for on-the-go use , eliminating the need for additional cables during travel. *SSD not included.
